title: capraea aurita
intro: Capraea aurita, also known as the Honeywort or Lamb's Throat, is a flowering plant that belongs to the Boraginaceae family. It is native to the Mediterranean region and has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties. The plant has been reported to have health benefits such as reducing fever, treating respiratory issues, and soothing digestive problems due to its antibacterial and antiviral properties. The herbal preparations of Capraea aurita include teas, tinctures, and infusions, which can be consumed to reap its medicinal benefits.
